headline: What You Need To Know Ahead of Capital One's Earnings Release
summary: Capital One is scheduled to report its second-quarter results this month, and analysts expect a double-digit earnings decline.

headline: Lemonade's $10.5M data breach settlement: See if you qualify and learn how to protect your identity
summary: A class action suit alleges cybercriminals accessed driver’s license numbers belonging to approximately 190,000 Lemonade customers.

raw.headline: Lemonade's $10.5M data breach settlement: See if you qualify and learn how to protect your identity
raw.summary: A class action suit alleges cybercriminals accessed driver’s license numbers belonging to approximately 190,000 Lemonade customers.
